chords.title: Chords
chords.subtitle: Learn to hear and recognize chords by ear

scales.title: Scales
scales.subtitle: Learn to hear the character of scales and modes

about.heroText: My name is <1>Alex</1> — the creator of Fretify. I'm a frontend developer and guitarist. I've been playing guitar for several years and, like many, ran into the same problem:
about.heroQuote: I could play songs, but the guitar fretboard remained a "confusing map" to me.
about.whyIntro: Learning the fretboard is one of the hardest tasks for guitarists. You learn:
about.whyResult: But in the end, the fretboard still feels like something you have to "recall" rather than understand.
about.whyFretify: I built Fretify because I was missing a simple tool that helps you:
whyFretifyItems: practice scales and notes in a clear way
build muscle memory and visual fretboard awareness
about.ideaIntro: Fretify is more than a note visualizer. It's a learning tool that helps you:
ideaItems: gradually stop thinking in tabs and start thinking in music
about.goalHighlight: help guitarists truly understand the fretboard, not just memorize it.
about.goalDetail: I want Fretify to be a daily practice tool — something you open for 5–10 minutes a day and gradually become more confident in music.
about.whyContinueIntro: This project is personal. It brings together two worlds of mine:
about.whyContinueResult: I keep developing it because I believe: learning guitar should be visual, simple and enjoyable — not frustrating.
about.supportText: If Fretify has been useful, you can support the project by sharing it or making a donation. Any support helps me keep building new features and learning modes.

seo.defaultDesc: Chords, scales, metronome, drum machine and lessons for guitarists. Free in the browser.

/chords.title: Guitar chords — Fretify
/chords.desc: Find chords and positions on the guitar fretboard. Barre and open chord diagrams in all keys.

/scales.title: Guitar scales & modes — Fretify
/scales.desc: Explore major, minor, pentatonics and modes on the guitar fretboard with playback.

/metronome.title: Online metronome — Fretify
/metronome.desc: Free online metronome for guitarists. Set tempo, rhythmic patterns and sound types.

/drums.title: Online drum machine — Fretify
/drums.desc: Create rhythm patterns in the browser. 10 styles: rock, funk, hip-hop, trap, reggae, jazz.

/lessons.title: Guitar lessons online — Fretify
/lessons.desc: Interactive Duolingo-style lessons for guitarists. Learn to hear chords and scales by ear.

/about.title: About — Fretify
/about.desc: Fretify — a guitar fretboard learning tool built by a guitarist and developer.
